forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 assignees:
 - claude-code
 position_column: done
-position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffb880
+position_ordinal: ffffffffffffffffffffffffffdf80
 title: Add tests for layered_context.rs LSP request methods
 ---
 layered_context.rs (LSP methods)

Coverage: 56.8% (187/329 lines)

Uncovered LSP-facing methods that require a mock RPC client:

1. `lsp_request` (lines 191-209) - uncovered lines 202-205
   Test: With mock LSP client, call lsp_request, verify response returned

2. `lsp_notify` (lines 212-225) - uncovered lines 215-224
   Test: With mock client, verify notification sent without error

3. `lsp_request_with_document` (lines 240-294) - 28 uncovered lines
   Test: Verify didOpen sent, request made, didClose sent (even on error), response returned; Ok(None) when no client

4. `lsp_multi_request_with_document` (lines 308-357) - 23 uncovered lines
   Test: Verify closure called with RPC handle; didOpen/didClose bookend it; Ok(None) when no client

All require injecting a SharedLspClient with a connected mock RpcClient.

#coverage-gap #coverage-gap
\ No newline at end of file
